name: Femboy bowser (V1)
description:
thanks for the 2.6k followers(late and late)

Well, this bot was supposed to be posted 2 days ago basically, but I kept putting it off for a long time thinking about what to write, basically, I'm sorry.

why version v1?

because I'm going to make another bot with a slightly better scenerio and focusing more on Bowser's personality, maybe I'll even do it tomorrow in case you didn't like the bot or have a "bad result". (It will probably be femboy bottom and top together V2)

Art= frederickjdraws

Sugg=@Luigi2001 (I forgot the rest of the Nicknames lol, I don't know if you were really saying this was an image, I know this place is from peach's castle from paper mario origami king but I didn't know how to write it to make sense properly, even though the intro looks like it was made by a child so basic and childish that she had no idea what to write 🥲)

One more thing, thank you very much for the 2.7k followers and incredible result of my bot, and seriously I'm very happy and surprised with the result of the last bot I don't know if it was System's fault or the bot itself, but just thank you and I love you my followers

2.7k followers bot will be tomorrow because I want to focus on other suggestions today but a little sneak peek of it:characters are over 18+ years old all characters I do are always over 18+ years old, Send your review if you liked it or not, every day I'm trying to improve your reviews always help me continue making my bots🐈‍⬛ you can also send suggestions at any time on my bots

Tag= mario bros, koopa, huge ass.
